languages.text: "Соломон, помоги зарковцам выстроить оборону своих поселений. Данрок, обеспечьте колонию снабжением извне. Будем ждать, пока все закончится".
"Solomorne, help the Zarkovians to organise the defence of their settlements. Danrok, provide the colony with supplies from the outside. We will wait until this is over."
languages.original_text: "Соломон, помоги зарковцам выстроить оборону своих поселений. Данрок, обеспечьте колонию снабжением извне. Будем ждать, пока все закончится".

traits.locale_text: "Solomorne, help the Zarkovians to organise the defence of their settlements. Danrok, provide the colony with supplies from the outside. We will wait until this is over."
"Solomorne, help the Zarkovians to organise the defence of their settlements. Danrok, provide the colony with supplies from the outside. We will wait until this is over."
"Solomorne, help the Zarkovians to organise the defence of their settlements. Danrok, provide the colony with supplies from the outside. We will wait until this is over."

languages.text: 「ソロモーン、ザルコビアンの集落の防衛を組織するのを手伝ってくれ。ダンロック、コロニーに外部からの物資を供給してくれ。この騒ぎが収まるまで待とう」
languages.original_text: "Solomorne, help the Zarkovians to organise the defence of their settlements. Danrok, provide the colony with supplies from the outside. We will wait until this is over."

traits.locale_text: 「ソロモーン、ザルコビアンの集落の防衛を組織するのを手伝ってくれ。ダンロック、コロニーに外部からの物資を供給してくれ。この騒ぎが収まるまで待とう。」

languages.text: «Solomorne, ayude a los zarkovianos a organizar la defensa de sus asentamientos. Danrok, proporcione a la colonia recursos externos. Esperaremos hasta que esto acabe».
languages.original_text: "Solomorne, help the Zarkovians to organise the defence of their settlements. Danrok, provide the colony with supplies from the outside. We will wait until this is over."

traits.locale_text: «Solomorne, ayude a los zarkovianos a organizar la defensa de sus asentamientos. Danrok, proporcione a la colonia recursos externos. Esperaremos hasta que esto acabe».

languages.text: “索罗蒙，协助扎尔科夫人组织定居点防御。丹罗克，从外部为殖民地调运补给。我们静候这场灾变自行平息。”
languages.original_text: "Solomorne, help the Zarkovians to organise the defence of their settlements. Danrok, provide the colony with supplies from the outside. We will wait until this is over."

traits.locale_text: “索罗蒙，协助扎尔科夫人组织定居点防御。丹罗克，从外部为殖民地调运补给。我们静候这场灾变自行平息。”

languages.text: "Solomorne, helft den Zarkovianern, die Verteidigung ihrer Siedlungen zu organisieren. Danrok, Ihr versorgt die Kolonie von außen mit Vorräten. Wir werden das hier aussitzen."
languages.original_text: "Solomorne, help the Zarkovians to organise the defence of their settlements. Danrok, provide the colony with supplies from the outside. We will wait until this is over."

traits.locale_text: "Solomorne, helft den Zarkovianern, die Verteidigung ihrer Siedlungen zu organisieren. Danrok, Ihr versorgt die Kolonie von außen mit Vorräten. Wir werden das hier aussitzen."

languages.text: "Solomorne, Zarkovluların yerleşim yerlerinin savunmasını organize etmesine yardım et. Danrok, koloniye dışarıdan erzak sağla. Bu iş bitene kadar bekleyeceğiz."
languages.original_text: "Solomorne, help the Zarkovians to organise the defence of their settlements. Danrok, provide the colony with supplies from the outside. We will wait until this is over."

traits.locale_text: "Solomorne, Zarkovluların yerleşim yerlerinin savunmasını organize etmesine yardım et. Danrok, koloniye dışarıdan erzak sağla. Bu iş bitene kadar bekleyeceğiz."

languages.text: « Solomorne, vous aiderez les Zarkoviens à organiser la défense de leurs bases. Danrok, vous ravitaillerez la colonie depuis l'extérieur. Nous allons attendre que les choses se tassent. »
languages.original_text: "Solomorne, help the Zarkovians to organise the defence of their settlements. Danrok, provide the colony with supplies from the outside. We will wait until this is over."

traits.locale_text: « Solomorne, vous aiderez les Zarkoviens à organiser la défense de leurs bases. Danrok, vous ravitaillerez la colonie depuis l'extérieur. Nous allons attendre que les choses se tassent. »
